entries.name: Home
entries.description: The main marketing homepage featuring a hero, AI interaction previews, social proof, and a PRO access call-to-action.

entries.name: Browse
entries.description: A rich gallery view of AI interaction cards with filters, modes, and pattern group navigation.

entries.name: Browse Detail
entries.description: A full-screen interaction detail view with a large video, tags, download controls, and similar examples grid.

entries.name: Insights
entries.description: An editorial insights listing page with large article cards, categories, and author metadata.

analysis.propsInterface: interface InsightsClientProps { data: { categories: { name: string; image?: string }[]; posts: { id: number; title: string; subtitle?: string; category: string; author?: string; authorAvatar?: string; date?: string; image?: string; slug: string; tier?: "FREE" | "PRO" }[]; recentEssays: { id: number; title: string; subtitle?: string; category: string; author?: string; authorAvatar?: string; date?: string; image?: string; slug: string; tier?: "FREE" | "PRO" }[] } }

entries.name: Insight Article
entries.description: A longform article layout with hero imagery, typographic content, author info, and related reading.

entries.name: Insight Editor
entries.description: An admin insight editing page that loads a rich text editor with embeds and structured fields.

entries.name: Team
entries.description: A grid of team member cards with avatars, roles, and bios in a clean card layout.

entries.name: Reset Password
entries.description: A focused form page for resetting a password with validation messages and supporting illustration.

entries.name: Forgot Password
entries.description: A minimal email capture form for requesting a password reset with supportive copy and illustration.

entries.name: Login
entries.description: A split-layout login experience with Google sign-in, magic link, password form, and astronaut artwork.

entries.name: Signup
entries.description: A two-step signup and plan selection flow with marketing copy, plan cards, and testimonials.

entries.name: Collection
entries.description: A dashboard of user collections showing stacked preview cards, item counts, and create controls.

entries.name: Collection Detail
entries.description: A curated collection view with a hero title, curator profile chip, share controls, and interaction grid.

entries.name: Apps
entries.description: A categorized list of product names linking into per-app interaction galleries.

entries.name: App Detail
entries.description: An app overview page with logo, pattern chips, and a grid of AI interaction videos for that product.

entries.name: Patterns
entries.description: An AI pattern explorer with staged sections, principle groupings, and interactive pattern cards.

entries.name: Pattern Detail
entries.description: A detailed pattern article page with rich markdown content, breadcrumbs, and PRO call-to-action.

entries.name: Patterns PDF
entries.description: A simple lead-capture page embedding a ConvertKit form to deliver the AI UX Patterns PDF.

entries.name: Glossary
entries.description: A long AI UX glossary with term sections, definitions, and example callouts separated by dividers.

entries.name: Pricing
entries.description: A three-column pricing layout with billing toggle, PRO feature bullets, testimonials, and FAQ.

entries.name: Products
entries.description: A dark studio page showcasing multiple product agent cards with bold typography and imagery.

entries.name: Privacy
entries.description: A long-form privacy policy page styled with prose typography inside a centered content column.

entries.name: Manifesto
entries.description: A full-viewport scrolling manifesto with large typographic statements on separate snap sections.

entries.name: Community
entries.description: A community blog index with category chips and article cards for AI UX stories.

entries.name: Community Article
entries.description: A community blog detail layout with hero, rich content, author panel, and related posts list.

entries.name: Changelog
entries.description: A vertical changelog timeline of cards summarizing product updates and features.

entries.name: Categories
entries.description: A category hub page with large typographic section titles and lists of filter links.

entries.name: Category Detail
entries.description: A category collection page with a descriptive intro card and a grid of AI interactions by category.

entries.name: Bundle Invite
entries.description: A personalized bundle invitation page with gradient hero, bundle items list, and CTAs.
An immersive full-screen 2025 rewind experience with animated slides, charts, and video content.

entries.name: Bite Detail Card
entries.description: An interaction detail panel with embedded video player, metadata chips, save controls, and related grid.

entries.name: Bites Grid
entries.description: A responsive grid of interaction thumbnails with hover autoplay, new badges, and context menu actions.

entries.name: Bunny Stream Video
entries.description: A streamlined video element wrapper configured for Bunny Stream previews with poster support.

entries.name: Exit Intent Modal
entries.description: A newsletter capture dialog with headline, rating row, and embedded ConvertKit form.

entries.name: Subscribe Banner
entries.description: A flexible subscription banner with background imagery, pill label, email form, and rating row.

entries.name: Canvas Embed View
entries.description: A rich editor node view rendering an iframe preview with controls for URL, variant, and responsive heights.

entries.name: Insight Editor
entries.description: A tiptap-based insight editor with toolbar, embeds, and spacious content area styling.

entries.name: Editor Toolbar
entries.description: A dense editor toolbar with icon buttons for formatting, lists, links, images, and embeds.

entries.name: Navbar
entries.description: A responsive top navigation bar with animated tab background, search, collections, and auth controls.

entries.name: Tiny Footer
entries.description: A compact fixed footer bar with branding copy and small navigation links.

entries.name: Subscription Expiring Banner
entries.description: A narrow notification banner showing remaining PRO days with a CTA to renew.

entries.name: Carousel
entries.description: A full-screen overlay carousel wrapper that animates between detail cards with keyboard navigation.

entries.name: Google One Tap
entries.description: An invisible helper component that manages Google One Tap sign-in prompts.

entries.name: Bunny Stream Player
entries.description: An iframe-based Bunny Stream player component styled to fill its container.

entries.name: Conditional Footer
entries.description: A wrapper that renders either the main footer or tiny footer depending on route and auth state.

entries.name: Conditional Navbar
entries.description: A wrapper that conditionally hides the main navbar for immersive routes like the 2025 rewind.

entries.name: Unified Subscribe
entries.description: A unified newsletter banner with value props, email form, and rating row in full and sidebar variants.

entries.name: Footer
entries.description: A structured footer with logo, column navigation hover highlights, social icons, and legal links.

entries.name: Article Card
entries.description: A responsive insight article card with thumbnail, category, badges, and meta text.

analysis.propsInterface: interface ArticleCardProps { post: InsightPost; category?: InsightCategory; variant?: "minimal" | "expanded"; className?: string; onClick?: () => void; }

entries.name: Workshop Banner
entries.description: A floating gradient banner advertising a workshop with copy and external link.

entries.name: Search Command
entries.description: A command palette dialog for searching interactions with thumbnails and pattern chips.

entries.name: Referral Discount Banner
entries.description: A shadcn banner component highlighting an applied referral discount code.

entries.name: Pro CTA
entries.description: A testimonial-driven call-to-action card inviting users to upgrade to PRO.

entries.name: Playground Fab
entries.description: A floating action button that opens the playground, styled as a circular P icon.

entries.name: Mobile Navigation
entries.description: A mobile dropdown navigation chip that surfaces primary pages and more links.

entries.name: Mixpanel Provider
entries.description: A provider component wiring route changes and user identity into Mixpanel tracking.

entries.name: Large Article Card
entries.description: A large hero-style article card with full-width image, category, subtitle, and PRO badge.

entries.name: Insight Badge
entries.description: A pill-shaped badge component for labeling insight cards with short uppercase labels.

entries.name: Home Navbar
entries.description: A lightweight homepage-specific navbar with logo, gallery link, and join button.

entries.name: Embed Iframe
entries.description: A responsive iframe wrapper that adjusts height based on viewport and postMessage resize events.

entries.name: Convert Kit Embed
entries.description: An embeddable ConvertKit form container that injects the provider script into the DOM.
